explanations.7: This passes a Docker group ID to the build process; the syntax ${DOCKER_OS_GROUPID:-1000} means 'use the environment variable DOCKER_OS_GROUPID if it exists, otherwise default to 1000'.
explanations.8: Same pattern as line 7, but for the user ID instead of group ID.
explanations.9: Same default pattern, but for the username; johndoe is the fallback username if no environment variable is provided.
explanations.10: This sets which user and group the container runs as; the format is userid:groupid, and both also use the same default-fallback syntax as the build args above.
explanations.13: This shares the host machine's Docker socket file with the container, which allows the container to control Docker on the host machine.
